context: Tests whether the agent correctly uses interval joins, temporal joins, lookup joins, deduplication patterns, CDC ingestion with debezium-json, and upsert-kafka for aggregation output.

checklist.name: Interval join syntax
checklist.description: Order-shipment join uses BETWEEN ... AND ... + INTERVAL '48' HOUR time bound between the two event-time columns

checklist.name: Temporal join syntax
checklist.description: Currency conversion uses JOIN ... FOR SYSTEM_TIME AS OF o.order_time for point-in-time rate lookup

checklist.name: Lookup join with PROCTIME
checklist.description: Customer enrichment uses FOR SYSTEM_TIME AS OF proc_time (not event time) and includes a PROCTIME() column definition

checklist.name: Debezium CDC format
checklist.description: Customer CDC table uses 'format' = 'debezium-json' in its WITH clause

checklist.name: CDC primary key
checklist.description: Customer CDC table declares PRIMARY KEY (customer_id) NOT ENFORCED

checklist.name: Upsert-kafka connector
checklist.description: Customer summary output table uses 'connector' = 'upsert-kafka' with key.format and value.format

checklist.name: Upsert primary key
checklist.description: Customer summary table has PRIMARY KEY on customer_id NOT ENFORCED

checklist.name: Deduplication pattern
checklist.description: Uses ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY order_id ORDER BY order_time DESC) with WHERE rn = 1 for deduplication

checklist.name: Watermarks on streams
checklist.description: Both orders and shipments tables declare WATERMARK with bounded out-of-orderness strategy

checklist.name: Currency rates primary key
checklist.description: Currency rates table has PRIMARY KEY (currency) NOT ENFORCED for temporal join versioning

checklist.name: State TTL consideration
checklist.description: Mentions or configures state TTL (table.exec.state.ttl) for unbounded aggregations

checklist.name: No unbounded regular join
checklist.description: Does NOT use a regular equi-join without time bounds for stream-to-stream joins
